description: Read, search, and analyze Hacker News with a local SQLite store, offline full-text search, and agent-native output

novel_features.name: Front-page diff
novel_features.description: See exactly what climbed, fell, appeared, or dropped off the front page since your last sync.

novel_features.name: Topic pulse
novel_features.description: See per-day mentions, average score, and comment volume for any topic over the last N days.

novel_features.name: Hiring thread aggregator
novel_features.description: Aggregate the last N monthly Who-is-Hiring threads: top languages, remote ratio, top companies, location distribution.

novel_features.name: Hiring company tracker
novel_features.description: Companies that posted in M of the last N hiring threads, with first-seen, last-seen, and months-posted count.

novel_features.name: Controversial
novel_features.description: Stories ranked by the highest comment-to-point ratio over a recent window — the discussions everyone is arguing about.

novel_features.name: Repost finder
novel_features.description: Has this URL been posted before? Lists every prior submission, with score, comments, and date.

novel_features.name: Story velocity
novel_features.description: Show a story's rank trajectory over time from local snapshots — climb, plateau, or fall.

novel_features.name: User stats
novel_features.description: Median and p90 score across a user's submissions, plus traction buckets and hour-of-day score distribution.

novel_features.name: Local FTS search
novel_features.description: Offline full-text search over every story and comment you have ever synced — corpus grows with use.

novel_features.name: Sync foundation
novel_features.description: Pull top/new/best/show/ask/job lists and recently-changed items into local SQLite for offline use and snapshot history.
